title: SCNicknamer
description: Lightweight client-side nickname and colour mod.
body:
# SC Nicknamer Styles in-game nicknames, name colours, and locator icons with a public json file. This allows everyone to see the same nicknames and colours in-game. **Note: This was created for Mumbo Jumbo's Minecraft Server, though you can use it on your server as well! To use this mod on your server, someone will need to host a json file with the data.** **Note: This is not official, nor required for Spooncraft.** ## Features SCNicknamer displays the preset nickname and colours of names in-game.
It colours Minecraft names with preset colours in the server tablist, player nametags, and chat messages, and optionally replaces them with nicknames in the same places.
The mod also colours player locator icons in the locator bar. ## Configuration With [ModMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu), you can enable and disable replacing and colouring names in each location (tablist, nametags, and chat) or colouring locator bar icons.
You can also change the location from which the data is sourced. This allows you to use it on your servers. An example of the data format can be seen [here](https://gwaff.uqcloud.net/scnicknamer/documentation). ## Disclaimer This mod was created for Java 1.21 and above client-side Fabric. I will not make a version for Bedrock, Forge, or versions before 1.21. I may make a server-side version in future, depending on demand.

This mod was created primarily for the [Mumbo Jumbo Spooncraft Server](https://discord.gg/yPafK59A8b); however, it will work for other servers provided you have a json file hosted somewhere. ## Issues & Suggestions If you have any issues or suggestions, please let me know. You can create a new issue on GitHub [here](https://github.com/GoldenRedstone/Spooncraft-Name-Link/issues), or contact pointer_rain on Discord.
